description: A finding with no record_type/record_id is submission-scoped. It is a diagnostic only (counted in unmapped_findings), never fanned out to a record, and never produces a task. Submission-scoped is expected, so it carries no mapping warning.

audit_event_details_json.label: warning
audit_event_details_json.summary: A submission-wide provenance concern with no specific record.

findings.message: Submission lacks an overall provenance summary tying its records together.
